name: 11L WD0.038 Non-Val + Int6 + Sliding Window
author: Silas Alberti
blurb: 11-layer GPT with GQA (NUM_KV_HEADS=4), decoupled weight decay (0.038) on Muon optimizer, int6 per-row quantization on MLP+attention weights, fp16 embeddings, zstd-22 compression, and sliding window evaluation (stride=64). Trained on standard training shards only (no val-only). Key innovations: weight decay reduces quantization gap and enables fitting 11 layers under 16MB; higher LR (0.025) improves non-val convergence.
notes: Standard training (trains on fineweb_train_*.bin). Sliding window BPB with stride=64. bytes_total shown is from seed 1337; all seeds under 16MB (max: 15,905,331).
